name: @rudi/video-editor-stack
description: Comprehensive RUDI video editing stack for quick ffmpeg operations, structured runs, captions, rendering, and QA.

scripts.test: RUDI_VIDEO_EDITOR_STATE_DIR=.test-rudi/state RUDI_VIDEO_EDITOR_OUTPUT_DIR=.test-rudi/outputs node --test test/*.test.js test/*.test.mjs && RUDI_VIDEO_EDITOR_STATE_DIR=.test-rudi/state RUDI_VIDEO_EDITOR_OUTPUT_DIR=.test-rudi/outputs node --import tsx --test test/*.test.ts
